_comment: Salesforce + app settings. Fill in credentials before first run. The security token is emailed by Salesforce when you reset it under Settings > My Personal Information > Reset My Security Token.
_phone_list_note: Optional T-Mobile/phone line list. Used to map a phone number on a bill to an employee; the EE list then provides the authoritative department.
_output_folder_note: Leave empty to default to <User Documents>/BillCategorizer/reports — safest for USB-portable installs. Set to an absolute path or a relative path to override.
